channel.title: Tmux on o0th
channel.description: Recent content in Tmux on o0th

item.title: Init
item.description: Installation git clone https://github.com/tmux-plugins/tpm ~/.tmux/plugins/tpm ~/.tmux.conf # List of plugins set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tpm' set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-sensible' # Dracula set -g @plugin 'dracula/tmux' set -g @dracula-show-battery false set -g @dracula-show-powerline true set -g @dracula-show-network false set -g @dracula-show-weather false set -g @dracula-show-time false set -g @dracula-show-left-icon session set -g terminal-overrides ',xterm-256color:Tc' set -g default-terminal "tmux-256color" set -as terminal-overrides ',xterm*:sitm=\E[3m' # Initialize TMUX plugin manager (keep this line at the very bottom of tmux.
